channel.title: 每日简报 on jaxiu He
channel.description: Recent content in 每日简报 on jaxiu He

item.title: 每日技术热点 - 2026年03月06日
item.description: 每天整理当日技术领域重要新闻，带你快速掌握行业动态。数据来源：MIT Technology Review、Hacker News、GitHub 等。 🤖 AI & 大模型 序号 新闻标题 链接 1 MIT Technology Review 查看 2 Is the Pentagon allowed to surveil Americans with AI? 查看 3 The Download: 10 things that matter in AI, plus Anthropic’s plan to sue the Pentagon 查看 4 The Download: an AI agent’s hit piece, and preventing lightning 查看 5 How much wildfire prevention is too much? 查看 6 Show HN: Sheila, an AI agent that replaced our accounting flow 查看 7 Capability-Tiered AI Governance Architecture (CEGP) 查看 8 Show HN: Stream-native AI that never sleeps, an alternative to OpenClaw 查看 9 Show HN: OculOS – Give AI agents control of your desktop via MCP
